title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.807 - Senator Roy Blunt Bridge designated for U.S. Highway 54 bridge in Cole and Callaway counties
text:
227.807.  Senator Roy Blunt Bridge designated for U.S. Highway 54 bridge in Cole and Callaway counties. — The bridge on U.S. Highway 54 crossing the Missouri River at Jefferson City in Cole and Callaway counties shall be designated the "Senator Roy Blunt Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such bridge, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738 merged with H.B. 2627)
